stem: Under MAS Notice FAA-N06, what must a financial adviser do before establishing a business relationship with a new client?

options.B: Perform customer due diligence (CDD) including identity verification

explanation: CDD/KYC must be performed at onboarding per MAS Notice FAA-N06. (来源方向: MAS Notice FAA-N06)

stem: Which is a red flag that may warrant filing a Suspicious Transaction Report (STR)?

options.A: A client paying premiums on time
options.B: A client refusing to provide identity documents and source of funds
options.C: A client asking about policy benefits

explanation: Refusal to provide ID / source of funds is a classic red flag. (来源方向: MAS Notice FAA-N06 / STRO)
